case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION VS. MONETTE THOMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON NOV-26-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-26-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
